title: AuditLogEntry
description: Schema for a single JSONL line in opencode-nexus audit log files (all.jsonl / session.jsonl / subagent JSONL).
$comment: Each audit log file is JSONL — one JSON object per line. This schema validates a single line object. The payload field is intentionally open-typed (any JSON value) because consumers append arbitrary event payloads. top-level additionalProperties is false; only the five declared fields are permitted at the top level.

ts.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the entry was recorded.

event_type.description: Fine-grained event type within the kind (e.g. 'message.updated', 'session.status').

session_id.description: OpenCode session ID that produced this entry, or null for global entries.

payload.description: Consumer-defined event payload. May be any JSON value; structure varies by event_type.
